generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for generated contracts
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names for type scope range assumption and guarantee
Write a guarantee that relates visible outputs to visible inputs for output dependency contracts
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantee expressions
Align the helper declaration type with the expression for assumed type vs actual type
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantee expressions
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
